topic.what: Systematic demonstration that chronic atrophic gastritis progresses to achlorhydria and pernicious anemia.
topic.how: Longitudinal cohort observation tracing progression from inflammation to glandular atrophy to systemic disease.
topic.why_matters: Established gastritis as a progressive, consequential condition — the intellectual precursor to Correa's carcinogenesis cascade.

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether a clear progression model was established
characteristics.value: Clear progression: chronic gastritis → atrophy → achlorhydria → pernicious anemia
characteristics.vs_baseline: Built on Fenwick 1866 but added longitudinal evidence

novelty: First longitudinal evidence of gastritis progression to systemic disease
Framed gastritis as consequential rather than benign
